div.head: 151. Editorial Note
div.p: British Prime Minister Eden arrived in the United States on January 30 for a series of meetings with United States officials over a 3-day period. During the afternoon session on January 30, Eden and Dulles spoke about European integration, with the Prime Minister expressing the view that his country was “hostile” to the Common Market and opposed to British entry into EURATOM. A memorandum of that conversation, as well as extensive documentation on the Eden visit, is scheduled for publication in a forthcoming Foreign Relations volume.
